1e:I[81957,["/_next/static/chunks/076f1ogf-il.v.js","/_next/static/chunks/11u.26kh8kw...js","/_next/static/chunks/09-wudx97fkxd.js","/_next/static/chunks/0-wstppi846jh.js","/_next/static/chunks/01o_465-h6ryu.js"],"MermaidDiagram"]
1f:I[32504,["/_next/static/chunks/076f1ogf-il.v.js","/_next/static/chunks/11u.26kh8kw...js","/_next/static/chunks/09-wudx97fkxd.js","/_next/static/chunks/0-wstppi846jh.js","/_next/static/chunks/01o_465-h6ryu.js"],"default"]

24:I[10752,["/_next/static/chunks/076f1ogf-il.v.js","/_next/static/chunks/11u.26kh8kw...js"],"ViewportBoundary"]
26:I[10752,["/_next/static/chunks/076f1ogf-il.v.js","/_next/static/chunks/11u.26kh8kw...js"],"MetadataBoundary"]
7:["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne's explicit consolidation function that promotes aged Working Memory entries to Episodic Memory, inspired by human sleep's role in memory consolidation. In v3.0+ this also integrates with MEMORIA structured tables — fact extraction feeds ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_facts"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_timelines"}]," during ",["$","code",null,{"children":"remember()"}],", and these tables persist independently of the Working Memory lifecycle."]}]
8:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"What Sleep Does"}]
9:["$","p",null,{"children":"During each consolidation cycle, Mnemosyne:"}]
a:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Scans"}]," Working Memory for entries older than TTL/2 (12 hours by default)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Groups"}]," candidates by ",["$","code",null,{"children":"source"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Summarizes"}]," each group via local LLM (MiniCPM5-1B GGUF) or AAAK text substitution"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Promotes"}]," summaries to Episodic Memory (with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"summary_of"}]," tracking originals)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Marks"}]," original Working Memory entries as consolidated (MEMORIA ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_*"}]," tables persist independently)"]}],"\n"]}]
b:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Trigger Conditions"}]
c:["$","p",null,{"children":"Consolidation triggers on:"}]
d:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Age threshold"}],": When Working Memory entries exceed TTL/2 (default: 12 hours with 24h TTL)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Explicit call"}],": ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mem.sleep()"}]," for manual consolidation"]}],"\n"]}]
e:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Consolidation Pipeline"}]
f:["$","$L1e",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart LR\n  A[Working Memory] -->|age > TTL/2| B[Candidate Selection]\n  B -->|group by source| C[Group Entries]\n  C -->|summarize| D[LLM or AAAK]\n  D -->|promote| E[Episodic Memory]\n  C -->|mark originals| F[Mark as Consolidated]\n"}]
10:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Step-by-Step"}]
11:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Candidate selection"}],": Find all Working Memory entries where ",["$","code",null,{"children":"created_at < now - TTL/2"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Group by source"}],": Cluster candidates by their ",["$","code",null,{"children":"source"}]," field"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Summarize"}]," each group using the LLM fallback chain:","\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Host backend"}]," (Hermes auxiliary client) — when ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_HOST_LLM_ENABLED=true"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Remote OpenAI-compatible API"}]," — if ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_BASE_URL"}]," is set"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Local LLM"}]," (MiniCPM5-1B GGUF) — offline, no API key"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"AAAK encoding"}]," — keyword-based text substitution as final fallback"]}],"\n"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Promote"}],": Insert summary into ",["$","code",null,{"children":"episodic_memory"}]," with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"summary_of"}]," referencing the original IDs"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Mark"}],": Set ",["$","code",null,{"children":"consolidated_at"}]," on the original entries in ",["$","code",null,{"children":"working_memory"}]," (rows remain recallable)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Log"}],": Record the consolidation in ",["$","code",null,{"children":"consolidation_log"}]]}],"\n"]}]
12:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Retention Values"}]
13:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Parameter"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_WM_MAX"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"10000"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Maximum Working Memory entries"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"TTL"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"24h"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Time-to-live for Working Memory entries"}]]}]]}]]}]
14:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Monitoring Consolidation"}]
15:["$","p",null,{"children":["Consolidation events are logged to the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"consolidation_log"}]," table:"]}]
16:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Column"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Type"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"id"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"INTEGER"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Auto-increment primary key"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"session_id"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"TEXT"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Session that was consolidated"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"items_consolidated"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"INTEGER"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Number of entries promoted"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"summary_preview"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"TEXT"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Preview of the generated summary"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"created_at"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"TIMESTAMP"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"When consolidation ran"}]]}]]}]]}]
17:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L1f",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Performance Impact"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["Sleep consolidation is synchronous — call ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mem.sleep()"}]," at idle times or after heavy ingestion. The method blocks until consolidation completes."]}]}]]}]]}]}]
